notes: source-support count is within the leaf gate, but multiplier variation still needs a parametric theorem
not all source-support classes have one scalar-normalized multiplier pattern

d4_normalized_farkas_shape.requirement: requires Lean D4 translation/Farkas transport theorem

d4_reversal_normalized_farkas_shape.requirement: requires Lean D4 plus reversal transport theorem

d4_survivor_shape_map.requirement: requires Lean D4 translation/Farkas transport theorem

denominator_signature.requirement: requires theorem from denominator signature to survivor Farkas system

normalized_shape_plus_source_terms.requirement: exact normalized shape plus exact source-indexed Farkas terms

raw_normalized_farkas_shape.requirement: direct exact normalized translation constraint system

raw_row_multiset.requirement: row permutation and positive row scaling only

raw_row_support_skeleton.requirement: requires theorem that support skeleton determines reusable Farkas proof

raw_source_farkas_support.requirement: same source rows only; exact multipliers are still required

raw_source_farkas_terms.requirement: exact source rows and multipliers for SourceFarkasCert

raw_survivor_shape_map.requirement: direct exact survivor mask to raw shape map

survivor_bitset.requirement: diagnostic only; bitset alone does not prove Farkas unsat

options.d4_layers: diagnostic until Lean transport is wired into this API
options.source_farkas_reconstruction: exact source-indexed Farkas terms for current Lean transport API
